display_description.he: ניהול תפעול יומיומי למסעדות ישראליות מול פלטפורמות משלוח — וולט, תן ביס ומשלוחה
display_description.en: Manage Israeli restaurant operations across delivery platforms — Wolt, 10bis, and Mishlocha. Use when user asks about "restaurant management Israel", "Wolt integration", "10bis", "Mishlocha", "food delivery platform", "menu sync", "restaurant orders", "delivery commission", or "ניהול מסעדה". Covers menu synchronization, order monitoring, revenue tracking with commission breakdowns, review management, and delivery performance analytics. Do NOT use for cooking recipes, personal meal planning, or non-Israeli delivery platforms.
